entities.name: Conversation Diagnostics
entities.context: Tool for analyzing conversation metadata quality in conversations.db to identify issues like incomplete titles, misclassified types, orphaned threads, and missing relationships

entities.name: conversations.db
entities.context: Database containing conversation metadata that is analyzed for quality issues

entities.name: convo_supervisor.py
entities.context: Python script that performs conversation analysis operations like listing, proposing renames, and archive suggestions

entities.name: N5
entities.context: System/framework structure containing the scripts folder where conversation diagnostics tools are located

relationships.context: Tool reads from and analyzes the conversations database
The Python script implements the conversation diagnostics functionality
Script is located in the N5/scripts/ directory structure
